reviews.name: w****
reviews.content:
저번에 카카오선물하기로 구입하고 가방에서 떨어져서 없어지구 바잇미에서 다시 구입했어요
이번엔 안없어지길ㅠㅠㅠ 러블키우는 집사로써 항상 같이다니는 기분들고 너무 예쁩니다
reviews.content_en: I bought it through KakaoGiftcard before, but it fell out of my bag and got lost. So I bought it again from BITE ME 🥲🥲🥲 As a cat mom with Ruvle, I feel like I'm carrying a piece of my baby with me all the time, and it's so pretty

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content:
저희 고냥이가 낚시대로 노는 거 좋아해서 고리에 걸어서 사냥놀이를 해줬더니 환장합니다ㅋㅋ
허공에 뒷발 팡팡하는 건 또 처음이네요ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
카메라만 꺼내면 관심 없는 척 해서 찍기 힘들었습니다..
평소에 새로 장난감 사줘도 10분이면 질리는데 20분 넘게도 잘 놀았는데 제가 나가야해서 더 못 하줬네요ㅠ
그냥 검정색이 귀여워서 샀는데 한번 놀고 회색이 됐네요ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
다양한 다자인이 나오면 좋겠어요ㅠ
월급받으면 두개 더 사러 올게요~
reviews.content_en: My kitty loves playing with the fishing rod toy, so I hung it on the hook and did some hunting play with her and she goes crazy 😂😂 This is the first time I've seen her kicking her back legs in the air like that 😂😂😂😂 She pretends not to care whenever I pull out the camera, so it was hard to get shots... Usually she gets bored of new toys in 10 minutes, but she played with this for over 20 minutes! I had to leave so I couldn't play more with her 🥲 I bought it in black because it's cute, but after one play session it turned gray 😂😂😂😂 I hope they release various designs 🥲 I'll come back to buy two more when I get paid~

reviews.name: 구****
reviews.content: 힝~ 너무 귀여워요 바스락바스락 울 댕댕이가 너무 좋아합니당 원뿔행사로 득템해서 치즈는 울 댕댕이 장난감, 블랙은 내 가방에 걸어서 사용하고 있어요
reviews.content_en: Awww~ it's so cute! 🥰 The crinkly sound makes it even better and my puppy loves it so much! I got the cheese one from the cone event as a lucky find, so my pup uses the cheese one as a toy, and I have the black one hanging on my bag!

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
너어무 앙증맞고 귀여워요~
바스락소리도 재밌고
절위해 주문~♡
reviews.content_en: It's so adorable and cute~ 💕 The crinkly sound is fun too and I ordered it right away for my baby~♡

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content: 너무 귀엽고 예쁩니다. 바스락 소리도 좋아요
reviews.content_en: So cute and pretty. I love the crinkly sound too

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 첫구매로 할인받아서 샀습니당 ㅎ 귀여워용 바스락 거려서 고양이가 갖고 놀다가 제가 가방에 달고 다녀요 ㅎ 고양이가 고등어라서 회색 구매 했습니다
reviews.content_en: I bought it with a first-purchase discount 😊 It's so cute! The crinkly sound is great, so my cat played with it and now I have it hanging on my bag 😊 My cat is a mackerel pattern, so I got the gray one

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 아기가 너무 조아해서 이렇게 있고 다른데도 더있고 한데 또샀어요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 저희 아이 최애 장난감이에요 증말 ♡
reviews.content_en: My baby loves it so much, so I already have one and bought another 😂😂😂😂 It's my kid's absolute favorite toy! For real ♡

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content: 구매 잘 하였습니다 매우 만족스러운 구매구요 빠른배송 감사드립니다 다시 재구매 하고 싶어집니다
reviews.content_en: Great purchase! Very satisfied with this purchase. Thank you for the fast shipping. I want to repurchase it again

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content: 구매 잘 하였습니다 매우 만족스러운 구매구요 빠른배송 감사드립니다 다시 재구매 하고 싶어집니다
reviews.content_en: Great purchase! Very satisfied with this purchase. Thank you for the fast shipping. I want to repurchase it again

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
작고 가벼워서 아이가 잘 놀아요
1.9kg아이라 가벼운걸 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: It's small and lightweight so my baby plays with it well. Since my pup is 1.9kg and likes light toys, this is perfect!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 넘 귀여워요! 하나는 아이가방에 달고 하나는 고양이 장난감으로 쓸까 고민중입니다ㅎㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: It's so cute! 😍 I'm thinking about hanging one on my kid's bag and using one as a cat toy 😂😂😂

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
너무 앙증맞고 귀여워요~~
바스락소리도 굿~~~~~
키링으로 사용~♡
reviews.content_en: It's so adorable and cute~~ The crinkly sound is great too~~~~~ Using it as a keychain~♡

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 뽀글뽀글 키링 인형이라 진짜 맘에 들어요. 왕귀여움 ㅜㅜ
reviews.content_en: It's a puffy keychain charm so I really love it. Super cute 😭😭

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 정말 짱귀예요 ~ 치즈냥이 넘 귀여워요
reviews.content_en: It's really super cute~ The cheese cat is so adorable~

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 까만 고양이가 넘 깜찍하고 귀여워요
reviews.content_en: The black cat is so chubby-cheeked and cute!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 아까워서 못쓰겠어요 너무 귀엽ㅜ
reviews.content_en: I'm too afraid to use it because it's too cute 😭

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 진짜 너어어무 귀여워요
reviews.content_en: It's seriously so incredibly cute!

reviews.name: 문****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여원요 바스락 소리가 큰 편은 아닌 거 같아요 몇 초 놀다가 말아서 가방에 달고 다니려고요 ^_^...
reviews.content_en: It's so cute 🥰 The crinkly sound doesn't seem to be too loud. My cat only played with it for a few seconds then stopped, so now I'm just using it as a bag charm ^_^...

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워요ㅜㅜㅜ 고양이 없는데 사버림 ㅜㅜ..... 사람용임
reviews.content_en: It's so cute 😭😭😭 I don't even have a cat but I bought it anyway 😭😭..... It's for me!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
첫 구입으로 저렴하게 키링 구입했어요.
우리 냥이들 러시안블루여서 그레이로 구입합니다^^
reviews.content_en: I got a keychain cheaply with my first purchase. Since our kitties are Russian Blues, I'm getting the gray one^^

reviews.name: 배****
reviews.content: 가방에 달아놓으려고 쿠폰 있어서 교환했네요. 비닐 들어있는지 냥이 얼굴 부분 누르면 바스락 거리네요. 귀엽긴한데 가격에 비해서 상품 질은 별로입니다.
reviews.content_en: I exchanged it using a coupon to attach to my bag. When I press on the cat's face part where the plastic is inside, it makes a crinkly sound. It's cute, but the product quality is not great for the price.

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content:
저희집 고양님과 닮아서 구매하게 되었어요 !
키링으로 쓰지만 바스락 소리가 나니까 엄청 관심가지더라구요. 마음에 들어요 '-'
reviews.content_en: I bought it because it looks like my cat at home! 😸 Even though I use it as a keychain, the crinkly sound makes them super interested in it. I love it '-'

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 7살고냥이도 잘 가지고 놉니다 바스락 소리나서그런지 던져주면 혼자 잘 놀아요
reviews.content_en: Even my 7-year-old kitty plays with it well. Since it makes a crinkly sound, she plays with it on her own when I toss it to her

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content: 만질때마다소리나구 너무 깜찍해요,,♡
reviews.content_en: It makes a sound every time I touch it and it's so adorable,,♡

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
바스락 바스락 촉감이 좋아요
만지고있으면 저희집 냥이가  뛰어옵니다
reviews.content_en: The crinkly tactile feeling is so good. When I touch it, my cat at home comes running over

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content: 키링이 귀여워요. 차키에 필요해서 구입했어요.
reviews.content_en: The keychain is cute. I bought it because I needed it for my car keys.

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content: 하찮아서 귀여워요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ이동가방에 달았어요
reviews.content_en: It's so charming because it's so simple 😂😂😂😂 I attached it to my carrying bag

reviews.name: 혜****
reviews.content: 가방에 잘 달고다니구잇음 귀여움
reviews.content_en: I'm carrying it on my bag well and it's so cute

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 귀여워요~~ 우리 아기들 닮아서 사랑스럽네요^^♡
reviews.content_en: It's cute~~ It looks just like my babies, so I love it^^♡

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
우리집애랑 똑같이 생겨서 블랙으로 골랐어유
에코백에 데코용으로 딱이네요
reviews.content_en: It looks exactly like my cat at home so I chose black~ It's perfect as a decoration piece for my eco bag!

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content: 바스락 소리에 아이들이 관심 가득합니다
reviews.content_en: The kids are so interested in the crinkly sound! 🎵

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 배송 완료 잘 가지고 놀아요
reviews.content_en: Shipping was quick and my pet loves playing with it!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
제 가방에 달려고 샀어요. ㅋㅋㅋ 
가방에 무언가 달고 싶었는데 아무리 찾아도 맘에드는게 없더군요. 
그러다 유레카!!!처럼 발견한 바잇미 고양이참 키링~~~ >.<
정말 정말 정말 너무 마음에 들어서 다른 색깔도 더 사려고요 ~~
reviews.content_en:
I bought this to attach to my bag. ㅋㅋㅋ I wanted to hang something on my bag but couldn't find anything I really liked no matter how hard I looked. Then eureka!!! I discovered the BITE ME cat keychain~~~ >.<
I absolutely love it so much that I'm planning to buy other colors too ~~

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
울냥이랑 비슷한 색으로 골랐습니다.
보들보들 촉감이 맘에드네요~ 크기도 키링으로 딱이고 
바스락 덕분에 ㅋㅋ 라이(말티즈)가 키 만질때마다 달려와요 ㅋㅋ
색갈별로 사고팟는데!! 기회되면 !! 색별로~구매할래요!
reviews.content_en:
I picked a color similar to my cat's.
I love the soft, fluffy texture~ The size is perfect for a keychain too, and thanks to the crinkly sound ㅋㅋㅋ my Lai (Maltese) comes running every time I touch the keychain ㅋㅋㅋ
I'm buying by color!! If I get the chance !! I want to buy them all by color!

reviews.name: 지****
reviews.content: 작은인형만 좋아해서 안좋아할줄은 알고 있었지만 귀여워서 구매했어요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I knew my cat only likes small plushies so they wouldn't like it, but it was so cute I bought it anyway ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content: 고앵이는 없지만 키링으로 쓰려고 구매했는데 진짜,,,,소중하구,,,,,귀엽네요,,,ㅠㅠ,,ㅠㅠ,ㅠㅠ,,,복실복실하고 키링겸 장난감이라 얼굴쪽 만지면 바스락거려요
reviews.content_en: I don't have a cat but I bought this to use as a keychain and honestly,,,,it's so precious,,,and so cute ㅠㅠ,,ㅠㅠ,ㅠㅠ,,,it's so fluffy and since it's a keychain and toy, it makes a crinkly sound when you touch the face

reviews.name: y****
reviews.content: 혹시 넘맘에들어해서 뺏길까봐 냥이한테는 안보여줫지만.. 사람에게도 넘이쁜 뿌시럭키링인것..!
reviews.content_en: I'm so obsessed with it that I was worried my cat would snatch it, so I didn't show it to them.. but it's such a pretty crinkly keychain that even people love it..!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 가방에 달았는데 귀여워요.. 안에 비닐로 채워져있는지 누르면 부스럭 소리나요
reviews.content_en: I attached it to my bag and it's so cute.. it makes a rustling sound when you press it, so it must be filled with plastic inside

reviews.name: 누****
reviews.content:
키링으로 쓰려고 주문했어요 
너무 귀엽네요 애들도 관심이 많네요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en:
I ordered this to use as a keychain
It's so adorable and the kids are really interested in it too ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: s****
reviews.content: 집사는 아닌데... 가방에 잘 달고 다니고 있어요 너무 귀엽습니다
reviews.content_en: I'm not a cat owner... but I'm carrying it around attached to my bag and it's so cute

reviews.name: 혠****
reviews.content: 너무너무 귀여워서 샀어요! ㅎㅎ 바잇미 자체 제품들 최고에요
reviews.content_en: I bought it because it's so so adorable! ㅎㅎ BITE ME products are the best

reviews.name: 예****
reviews.content: 우리 코코 닮아서 샀어요^^ 하얀색이랑 같이 샀네요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I bought it because it looks like my Coco^^ I got it in white too ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: m****
reviews.content:
삼센치정도작고
던지고놀기에좋더라구요
귀여워요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en:
It's about three centimeters small
it's great for throwing and playing with
it's so cute ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content: 저희집 고양이 닮아서 샀어요 넘 귀여워용ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: I bought it because it looks like my cat at home, it's so adorable ㅠㅠ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 귀엽네요 더 다양한 얼굴도 나오면 좋겠어요
reviews.content_en: It's cute, I wish they'd come out with more variety in faces

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
귀여운 키링이예요
퀄리티 적당합니다
reviews.content_en:
It's a cute keychain
The quality is decent

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 바스락소리가 나서 귀여워요.
reviews.content_en: The crinkly sound is so cute.

reviews.name: w****
reviews.content: 완전 귀여워요.. 잇 아이템
reviews.content_en: It's completely adorable.. must-have item

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content:
귀엽네요 ㅎㅎㅎ
잘쓰겠습니당
reviews.content_en:
It's cute ㅎㅎㅎ
I'll use it well

reviews.name: p****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워요!! ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: It's so so cute!! ㅠㅠ
